Pricing.title: Pricing Plans
Pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs.

return.title: Payout setup completed
return.description: Your payout setup has been completed successfully. Please return to the Peppercheck app to confirm.
return.note: If additional information is required, please tap the setup button again and complete the necessary steps.
return.contact: If you have any questions, contact us at {email}.

refresh.title: Payout setup did not complete successfully
refresh.description: Please return to the app and restart the setup.
refresh.note: Any information you have already entered has been saved. You only need to provide the missing details.
refresh.contact: If you have any questions, contact us at {email}.

operator.heading: 1. Operator
operator.body: This app ("Peppercheck") is operated by CloveClove ("we", "us", or "our"). For inquiries, please contact us at the email address listed at the bottom of this page.

collect.heading: 2. Information We Collect
collect.intro: We collect the following categories of information:

account.heading: Account Information
account.body: Email address, display name, profile image, and timezone — obtained through Google Sign-In and your profile settings.

task.heading: Task and Review Data
task.body: Task details (title, description, criteria), evidence submissions (text and uploaded images/files), review messages, and rating comments.

payment.heading: Payment Information
payment.body: Stripe account identifiers, card brand and last 4 digits, card expiration date, subscription status, point and reward balances, and payout history. Full card numbers are handled directly by Stripe and are never stored on our servers.

device.heading: Device Information
device.body: Push notification tokens (FCM), device type, and last active timestamp.

usage.heading: Usage Data
usage.body: Referee availability time slots and matching history.

purpose.heading: 3. Purpose of Use
purpose.intro: We use collected information for the following purposes:

items.auth: To authenticate users and manage accounts
items.service: To provide, maintain, and improve the Peppercheck service
items.payment: To process payments and referee payouts
items.notification: To send push notifications about task updates and matching results
items.support: To respond to inquiries and provide support
items.safety: To ensure safety, prevent fraud, and enforce our terms of service

thirdParty.heading: 4. Third-Party Services
thirdParty.intro: We share information with the following third-party services as necessary to operate the app:

google.name: Google (Sign-In)
google.body: Email and profile information for authentication.

stripe.name: Stripe
stripe.body: Payment method and account information for payment processing and referee payouts.

firebase.name: Firebase Cloud Messaging
firebase.body: Device tokens for delivering push notifications.

supabase.name: Supabase
supabase.body: All user data for backend storage and authentication.

security.heading: 5. Data Storage and Security
security.body: We use industry-standard security measures, including encryption in transit (TLS) and access controls, to protect your data. However, no method of transmission or storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

retention.heading: 6. Data Retention
retention.body: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, we will delete your personal data within 30 days, except where retention is required by law or necessary for legitimate business purposes (e.g., resolving disputes, enforcing agreements).

rights.heading: 7. Your Rights

items.access: Request access to the personal data we hold about you

rights.howTo: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at the email address below. We will respond to your request within 30 days.

children.heading: 8. Children's Privacy
children.body: Peppercheck is not intended for use by children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we become aware that we have collected such information, we will promptly delete it.

changes.heading: 9. Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. When we make material changes, we will notify users through the app or by other appropriate means. Continued use of the app after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.heading: 10. Contact Us
contact.body: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or our data practices, please contact us at:

AccountDelete.title: Delete Account
AccountDelete.description: The following data will be deleted:
AccountDelete.deletedItems: Profile information, point balances, subscription, notification settings
AccountDelete.anonymizedLabel: The following data will be anonymized and retained:
AccountDelete.retainedLabel: Evidence files will be automatically deleted after a period.
AccountDelete.iapNotice: If you have an active subscription, please cancel it separately via Google Play or App Store settings.
AccountDelete.blocked: Cannot delete account: you have in-progress tasks or referee requests. Please complete or cancel them first.
AccountDelete.payoutFailed: Reward payout of ¥{amount} failed. Would you like to forfeit unpaid rewards and proceed with deletion?
AccountDelete.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
